name: Filesystem
description: Secure file read/write with configurable access controls. The most fundamental MCP server for any coding agent.

mcpServers.name: filesystem
mcpServers.description: Secure file operations with configurable access controls

name: Memory (Knowledge Graph)
description: Persistent knowledge graph memory that survives across sessions. Great for long-running projects and context accumulation.

mcpServers.name: memory
mcpServers.description: Knowledge graph-based persistent memory system

name: Fetch
description: Web content fetching optimised for LLM usage. Converts pages to Markdown. Ideal for doc lookups during coding.

mcpServers.name: fetch
mcpServers.description: Fetch external URLs and convert to LLM-friendly Markdown

name: Sequential Thinking
description: Forces the agent to think step-by-step via reflective thought sequences. Dramatically improves planning and reasoning quality.

mcpServers.name: sequential-thinking
mcpServers.description: Dynamic problem-solving through explicit thought sequences

name: Git
description: Read, search, and manipulate Git repositories. Inspect commits, diffs, branches, and blame information.

mcpServers.name: git
mcpServers.description: Tools to read, search, and manipulate Git repositories

name: GitHub
description: Full GitHub API access: issues, PRs, code search, repo management. Requires a personal access token.

mcpServers.name: github
mcpServers.description: GitHub API — issues, PRs, code search, and repo management

name: Time
description: Time and timezone conversion. Useful for scheduling, log analysis, and date-aware planning agents.

mcpServers.name: time
mcpServers.description: Time and timezone conversion capabilities

name: Basic Coding Bundle
description: Minimum useful coding toolset: read files, inspect repo history, and look up external docs.

mcpServers.name: filesystem
mcpServers.description: Read and write files in the project directory

mcpServers.name: git
mcpServers.description: Inspect commit history, diffs, and branches

mcpServers.name: fetch
mcpServers.description: Fetch external URLs and documentation

tooltip: Bundle: installs Filesystem + Memory + Git MCP servers. A solid baseline for any coding agent that needs file access, history awareness, and between-session memory.

name: Research Bundle
description: Gather information, remember facts across steps, reason sequentially, and handle dates.

mcpServers.name: fetch
mcpServers.description: Fetch external URLs and documentation

mcpServers.name: memory
mcpServers.description: Persist facts across agent sessions

mcpServers.name: sequential-thinking
mcpServers.description: Step-by-step reasoning and plan generation

tooltip: Bundle: installs Fetch + Memory + Sequential Thinking. The ideal set for research agents that browse the web, remember findings, and reason step-by-step.

name: GitHub Coding Bundle
description: Best for open-source work, issue handling, PR drafting, and repo-based coding workflows.

mcpServers.name: github
mcpServers.description: Read and write GitHub issues, PRs, and code

mcpServers.name: git
mcpServers.description: Inspect commit history, diffs, and branches

mcpServers.name: filesystem
mcpServers.description: Read and write files in the project directory

mcpServers.name: fetch
mcpServers.description: Fetch external URLs and documentation

tooltip: Bundle: installs GitHub + Git + Filesystem. For teams that want their agent to read PRs, view diffs, and edit files in one workflow.

name: Documentation Bundle
description: Inspect the repo, read external docs, and keep persistent context for documentation tasks.

mcpServers.name: filesystem
mcpServers.description: Read and write files in the project directory

mcpServers.name: fetch
mcpServers.description: Fetch external URLs and documentation

mcpServers.name: memory
mcpServers.description: Persist facts across agent sessions

tooltip: Bundle: installs Filesystem + Fetch + Memory. Gives a documentation agent everything it needs to read existing docs, fetch references, and remember context.

name: Planning Bundle
description: Spec writing, planning, roadmap generation, and task breakdown with structured reasoning.

mcpServers.name: sequential-thinking
mcpServers.description: Step-by-step reasoning and plan generation

mcpServers.name: memory
mcpServers.description: Persist facts across agent sessions

tooltip: Bundle: installs Sequential Thinking + Memory + Time. Perfect for planning agents — structured reasoning, persistent notes, and current date awareness.

name: Brave Search
description: Real-time web search via the Brave Search API. Gives your agent up-to-date information beyond its training cutoff.

mcpServers.name: brave-search
mcpServers.description: Web search via Brave Search API

tooltip: Enables live web search. Required for research, competitor analysis, and up-to-date market data tasks.

name: Puppeteer (Browser)
description: Full browser automation: navigate pages, click elements, fill forms, and take screenshots. Essential for QA and E2E testing agents.

mcpServers.name: puppeteer
mcpServers.description: Browser automation via Puppeteer

tooltip: Gives the agent a real browser. Enables end-to-end test writing, screenshot verification, and UI smoke tests.

name: E2B Code Interpreter
description: Sandboxed Python & Node.js execution. The agent can run code, validate outputs, and iterate — safely isolated from your machine.

mcpServers.name: e2b
mcpServers.description: Sandboxed code execution via E2B cloud

tooltip: Lets the agent run code in a secure sandbox, verify test results, and iterate on implementations without touching your local filesystem.

name: Notion
description: Read and write Notion pages, databases, and blocks. Ideal for knowledge base agents, documentation, and content planning.

mcpServers.name: notion
mcpServers.description: Notion API — pages, databases, and blocks

tooltip: Connects the agent to your Notion workspace. Enables doc generation, knowledge base lookups, and content calendar management.

name: Sentry
description: Query Sentry for errors, issues, and stack traces. Gives your debugger agent real error context instead of hypotheticals.

mcpServers.name: sentry
mcpServers.description: Sentry error tracking and issue queries

tooltip: Pulls live Sentry issues into the agent's context. Your debugger can see the exact stack trace before suggesting a fix.

name: Slack
description: Read channels and send messages to Slack. Useful for notification agents, customer success bots, and team update workflows.

mcpServers.name: slack
mcpServers.description: Slack messaging and channel access

tooltip: Gives the agent Slack send/read access. Great for customer success agents that need to notify teams or log interactions.

name: PostgreSQL
description: Read-only access to a PostgreSQL database. Lets data analysis agents query tables, inspect schemas, and explain results.

mcpServers.name: postgres
mcpServers.description: Read-only PostgreSQL queries and schema inspection

tooltip: Gives the agent direct read-only database access. SQL queries, schema inspection, and result explanation all in one context window.

name: Security Review Bundle

mcpServers.description: Read source files for vulnerability scanning

mcpServers.description: Inspect commit history and blame

mcpServers.name: brave-search
mcpServers.description: Search for CVEs and security advisories

mcpServers.name: sentry
mcpServers.description: Pull live error reports for triage

description: Automate browser tests, run code in a sandbox, and inspect the codebase. Perfect for Test Engineer agents.

mcpServers.description: Inspect changed files to generate targeted tests

name: GitLab

name: Redis

name: Firecrawl
description: Crawl entire websites and extract clean Markdown for RAG pipelines. Much more thorough than single-page fetch.

mcpServers.description: Full-site crawling with Markdown output for RAG

name: Tavily Search
description: AI-optimised web search with summarised, factual results. Higher quality than raw search for research agents.

mcpServers.description: AI-optimised web search via Tavily API

mcpServers.name: exa-search
mcpServers.description: Neural web search via Exa API
